title: salsola basaltica
intro: Salsola basaltica, also known as desert saltwort or saltwort, is a shrubby succulent plant native to arid and semi-arid regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Salsola basaltica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
